121:
Gulls are often a welcome sight on ships, as their presence means land─and home─is close by. La Noscean sailors began gathering the feathers dropped on deck, and fashioning them into trinkets to give to their children as a symbol of hearth and happiness.
I would be grateful if you could see that feather into your Sahagin friend's hands.
